system.description:
Psionicists are masters of mind over matter. Rigorous physical and mental training allows them to learn the Way, a philosophy of mental discipline, to become master of the Will, or innate mental power.

Mental Power Resistance: Psionicists gain a +2 bonus to all saving throws against mental powers, even the powers of other psionicists

Psionic Powers: Psionicists know a number of psionic powers depending on their level

Power Activation: Psionic Powers take effect at the end of the character's round. When a psionic character activates a Power, he may not take other actions that round, but may perform other actions while the power is active

Power Rank: Psionic Powers are classified by ranks, which determine the intensity of the power's effects

Multiple Powers: A psionicist cannot activate more than one power in a single round, but can maintain multiple powers at the same time

Psionic Academy: A psionicist may establish a psionic academy where they teach their skills to students, attracting 1d6 apprentices of level 1-4

class.weapons: Daggers, staves, short swords and shortbows
